summary: Bulk import feature fully validated end-to-end. Backend POST /api/products/bulk: auth-required, empty=400, valid array inserts and persists. Frontend /app/import: nav link, dropzone, template button, file upload (CSV), detected column badges (green mapped), preview table with correct count/rows, do-import triggers API and success toast, products appear in /app/products. All 3 backend tests + full UI flow pass.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/products/bulk has no maximum batch size cap — could allow abuse (large payloads). Consider limiting (e.g. 5000 items).
ProductIn used for bulk allows arbitrary fields via defaults, but no validation of positive price/discount range — pre-existing pattern.
seed_data_creation: Ephemeral: 3 products imported via UI then deleted via API in same run. Test CSV at /tmp/import_test/products.csv (non-persistent).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk import verified. Backend tests reusable at /app/backend/tests/test_bulk_import.py. Prior iteration_1 noted PUT /api/products requires full body and product_type field naming mismatch (from-frontend 'type') — unchanged, low priority.
